JSON.rationale: C must be first — stale code-index breaks all downstream analysis. Courier-loop and Law 2 assessments rely on accurate code visibility. No fix can be trusted if the index is corrupt.
JSON.risk_if_other_side_wins: Fixing A or B on stale code means potentially reinforcing outdated architecture or misapplying Law 2 to deleted components. Risk of wasted work and false compliance.
